content: pygame-ce 2.5.7 released ~March 2026; supports Python 3.10-3.14; adds universal2 macOS wheels, native Windows-on-ARM support, mouse click-count property. 2.5.6 added lazy-loading of surfarray/sndarray halving import time and ~30% faster Vector2 construction. Confirms pygame-ce is fast-moving and current for a 2026 project start.
